caption: A sequence of images captured through a green-tinted night vision device shows a tactical operation unfolding near a vehicle. Several individuals in military-style tactical gear, including helmets and vests, are positioned on a paved surface. In the beginning, three figures are seen; one stands to the left, another is partially obscured in the center, and a third stands to the right wearing a vest with a rectangular patch on the back. As the sequence progresses, the figures shift positions. A person emerges from the open side door of a white van, moving forward while holding a weapon. Another individual moves toward the right side of the frame. A small, blue pentagonal icon appears in the lower right corner of each view. The scene remains focused on the coordinated movements of the tactical team around the vehicle under low-light conditions.
